texto: A part of my appreciation for the good which moments bring has come from awareness and recognition. But it has also come from a correspnding sadness which arises from their passing. When something that can never quite be reenacted comes to an end (and all moments are that way), I feel a pensiveness within. This pensiveness gives my life a quality that might be best described as bittersweet. And those moments take on double meaning and richness - because they are here now - and because they will not always be.
explicacao: Citação de Bob Benson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “A part of my appreciation for the good which moments bring has come from awareness and recognitio…” articula reflexao, nostalgia, moments em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
